notes: and to drink, and anointed them, and carried all the feeble of them upon asses, and brought them to Jericho, the city of palm trees, to their brethren: then they returned to Samaria.
Hezekiah (chs. 29-32) Manasseh (33:1-20) Amon (33:21-25) Josiah (chs. 34; 35) Josiah's Successors (36:1-14) Exile and Release (36:15-23)
